options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <resistance_value> # Value of the drive resistance (float, required) <port_list> # List of ports

options.name: -fall
options.description: Specifies the drive resistance for falling transition

options.name: -max
options.description: Specifies the drive resistance for late path

options.name: -min
options.description: Specifies the drive resistance for early path

options.name: -rise
options.description: Specifies the drive resistance for rising transition
